name: auto-transcribed-screen-capture
description: Request and consume narrated macOS screen demonstrations through the atsc CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Ask users for narrated macOS bug demonstrations.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex to request a focused narrated screen recording when UI bugs are hard to resolve from text alone, then consume atsc CLI artifacts from ~/.atsc.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the narrated bug capture workflow when repeated UI bug fixes fail or the user can demonstrate the issue more clearly than describing it.
